creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
=== Checking filesystem state after all packages deleted
508     ================================================================
509     list of extra files and directories in / (not present on clean 
system but present after everything was deinstalled)
510     6177158 8 -r--r--r-- 1 root wheel 404 Apr 29 21:34 
usr/local/etc/mfsmount.cfg.dist

still missed a plist-entry.

I added it to pkg-plist.
